step_info: Let's set up your usage profile.
language_select: Select your preferred language to get started.
completion_text: Your preferences have been saved. Eyecare is now tailored to your vision.
dashboard_subtitle: Control panel for your accessibility experience.
settings_summary: Summary of data loaded from onboarding to help you customize your experience.
aprendizado_description: Educational content to help users better understand accessibility options and how to use them.
auto-cuidado_description: Follow eye rest routines and self-care suggestions tailored to your preferences.
chroma_description: Use this area to explore color and contrast adjustments designed to improve visual perception in an accessible way.
dynamic_contrast_text: Contrast adjustments to balance reading between background and text without losing visual smoothness.
sensitive_palette_text: Carefully selected colors that preserve accessibility for different types of vision.
learning_description: Educational content to help users better understand accessibility options and how to use them.
vision_tips_text: Recommendations on how to best utilize Eyecare features in different environments.
color_teaching_text: Educational content to help users re-learn colors and better understand accessibility options and how to use them.
usage_flow_text: Step-by-step guide to the tools available for creating a more comfortable reading experience.
self_care_description: Follow eye rest routines and self-care suggestions tailored to your preferences.
scheduled_breaks_text: Reminders to take short breaks and rest your eyes during prolonged screen use.
ideal_environment_text: Tips for adjusting brightness, color temperature, and workplace ergonomics.
author: Davi Dias de Souza — author and designer
reset_confirm_text: Are you sure you want to reset your settings? This will delete your current preferences and take you back to the beginning.
settings_subtitle: Customize the screen's contrast and tone for your comfort.
comfort_desc: Reduces blue light with soft sepia tones.
explain_content: This text helps explain how these changes affect readability. The goal is to reduce eye strain during long reading sessions.
account_text: Create an account to sync EyeCare across the website and extension.
